data.name: error.auth.invalid_credentials
data.value: Authentication failed: invalid username or password.

data.name: error.auth.legacy_login_deprecated
data.value: The legacy login endpoint is deprecated. Please use the OIDC login flow.

data.name: error.common.internal_error
data.value: Internal server error. Please try again later.

data.name: error.order.retry_rejected
data.value: This order cannot be fulfilled again. Refresh and verify its state and payment evidence.

data.name: error.order.remark_failed
data.value: The order note could not be saved. Refresh and try again.

data.name: error.shop.benefit_operation_rejected
data.value: The benefit operation could not be completed. Refresh and verify the current benefit state.

data.name: error.moderation.validation_failed
data.value: The moderation request is invalid. Check the submitted values and try again.

data.name: error.moderation.target_user_not_found
data.value: The target user was not found.

data.name: error.moderation.report_already_pending
data.value: A pending report already exists for this content.

data.name: error.moderation.report_already_reviewed
data.value: The report has already been reviewed. Refresh the review queue.

data.name: error.moderation.target_action_unsupported
data.value: This target does not support a linked user-moderation action.

data.name: error.moderation.concurrent_review_conflict
data.value: The report was processed by another request. Refresh the review queue.
